summary: Tested Family Overview page, shared state, Save button, and quick links. Found critical issues: TrustDistributionAnalysis and HouseholdBudget pages do NOT use shared context - they have local state. IncomeSplitting has a bug showing $NaN for Base Income.

ui_bugs.issue: Base Income column shows '$NaN' for all family members - code references 'member.income' but context has 'taxableIncome'

integration_issues.flow: Family members sync between Income Splitting and Trust Distribution
integration_issues.issue: TrustDistributionAnalysis.jsx does NOT use shared familyMembers from context - has its own local state (lines 142-147). Family members do NOT sync between pages.
HouseholdBudget.jsx does NOT use shared budget from context - has its own local state (lines 111-144). Budget changes do NOT sync with Family Overview.

passed_tests: Family Overview page (/overview) loads correctly with all sections
12-month Cashflow Projection chart displays with Income bars (green), Expenses bars (red), and Cumulative Savings line (gold)
Chart legend shows: Cumulative Savings, Expenses, Income
Year-End Projection, Annual Savings, and Savings Rate displayed below chart
Save All button in header works - saves to localStorage and shows success toast
Sidebar Save button appears when hasUnsavedChanges=true
Sidebar Save button saves changes and hides after saving
Unsaved Changes badge appears when changes are made
Last saved timestamp displays after saving
Reset button triggers unsaved changes state
Quick links navigate correctly to Income Splitting, Trust Analysis, Budget, Tax Analysis
Family Members summary shows all 4 members with income, tax, and net values
Trust Distribution summary shows trust name, income, and beneficiary percentages
Budget summary shows monthly income, expenses, and surplus
Family Overview uses shared familyMembers from context correctly
action_items: CRITICAL: Update TrustDistributionAnalysis.jsx to use shared familyMembers from context instead of local state
CRITICAL: Update HouseholdBudget.jsx to use shared budget from context instead of local state
HIGH: Fix IncomeSplitting.jsx line 370 - change 'member.income' to 'member.taxableIncome' to fix $NaN display
critical_code_review_comments: TrustDistributionAnalysis.jsx (line 135-147): Only uses 'portfolio' from context, has local 'beneficiaries' state that doesn't sync with familyMembers
HouseholdBudget.jsx (line 108-144): Only uses 'portfolio' from context, has local 'incomes', 'expenses', 'oneOffCosts' state that doesn't sync with shared budget
IncomeSplitting.jsx (line 370): References 'member.income' but familyMembers have 'taxableIncome' property - causes $NaN display
The shared context in App.js has familyMembers, trust, budget but TrustDistributionAnalysis and HouseholdBudget don't use them

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Core features work but shared state sync is broken

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Family Overview page works correctly with 12-month cashflow chart. Save button in header and sidebar work. Quick links work. CRITICAL ISSUES: 1) TrustDistributionAnalysis.jsx has local beneficiaries state instead of using shared familyMembers - family members don't sync between pages. 2) HouseholdBudget.jsx has local state instead of using shared budget. 3) IncomeSplitting.jsx shows $NaN for Base Income due to wrong property name (income vs taxableIncome).

components: 12-month Cashflow Projection chart with ComposedChart (BarChart + LineChart)
Summary cards (Total Family Income, Total Tax, Monthly Surplus, Net Worth)
Quick links to Income Splitting, Trust Analysis, Budget, Tax Analysis
Family Members summary with income/tax/net breakdown

features: Save All button in header saves to localStorage
Shows success toast 'All changes saved successfully'
Button disabled when no unsaved changes
Saves changes and hides after saving
Gold color button with Save icon

family_members_sync.issue: TrustDistributionAnalysis has local state, doesn't use shared familyMembers from context

budget_sync.issue: HouseholdBudget has local state, doesn't use shared budget from context
